news.summary: In Toronto, the Air Canada Component of CUPE, representing 10,000 flight attendants at Air Canada and Air Canada Rouge, has initiated conciliation with the federal labor minister due to a deadlock with the airline. The union alleges that despite presenting equitable and long-awaited propositions, the company is showing reluctance and not approaching the negotiations earnestly. Wesley Lesosky, a veteran flight attendant with 24 years of service and President of the Air Canada Component, expressed concerns over the situation.
news.headline: CUPE: Air Canada flight attendants file for conciliation after impasse with airline, representing 10,000 employees.
Investment company NB Private Equity Limited reports changes in its ownership stake in the company.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Los Angeles, FlyQuest, a purpose-driven esports organization, announced a partnership with BRMUD, a popular Korean skincare brand that gained attention through collaboration with Cardi B. This unique collaboration marks the introduction of K-beauty into the world, combining the expertise of both brands to create innovative products and reach a broader audience.
news.headline: FlyQuest and BRMUD join forces for pioneering K-Beauty x Esports partnership, aiming to revolutionize the industry.

news.summary: A massive cupcake, weighing a staggering 60 ounces, has been introduced at The Kroger Co. Family of Stores. This colossal dessert offering comes from The Original Crumbs Bakeshop, which is renowned for kickstarting the gourmet cupcake trend in 2003. With its debut in supermarket dessert sections, the oversized treat is expected to make quite an impact.
news.headline: Original CRUMBS Bakeshop launches a 60-ounce Colossal Cupcake at Kroger stores, redefining gourmet dessert options.

news.summary: SuperCom, a global provider of secured solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity sectors, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported a Non-GAAP Net Income of $5.24 million and a Non-GAAP EPS of $1.5. Additionally, they achieved a record Gross Margin of 63.3%. SuperCom is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol SPCB.
news.headline: SuperCom reports record net income of $4.2M, EPS $1.2, Non-GAAP net income $5.24M, Non-GAAP EPS $1.5, and gross margin of 63.3%.

news.summary: A prestigious InsurTech company awarded brokerage firm Brown & Brown with the Agency Impact Leader Award for 2025. Vertafore®, a top insurance technology provider, presented this recognition at their yearly user conference held in Denver on May 14, 2025. This accolade highlights Brown & Brown's exceptional performance and influence in the industry.
news.headline: Vertafore recognized Brown & Brown with 2025 Agency Impact Leader Award at annual conference.

news.summary: The company has been directed to address accusations that their artificial intelligence specialist referenced a fake academic source in relation to a $75 million copyright lawsuit.
news.headline: Company faces lawsuit for citing false source in song lyrics, ordered to respond in $75M copyright case.

news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) has experienced a notable surge of 42% in the last week, with the cryptocurrency currently priced at $2,628.60, reflecting a 7-day upward trend. This significant increase is attributed to the introduction of the Pectra upgrade, a crucial development in Ethereum's network advancement, alongside substantial institutional accumulation. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $104,057.12, showing a 7.3% increase over the past week, and XRP stands at $2.61 with a 22.2% rise. Abraxas Capital, based in London, recently acquired 242,652 ETH, amounting to around $561 million. As institutional interest grows and Ethereum's fundamentals stabilize, the future trajectory depends on ETH's ability to maintain its momentum above its current level. Analyst Ali Martinez notes $3,100 as the key resistance level for Ethereum, with strong support estimated at $2,233. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ethereum surges 42% in 7 days, driven by Pectra upgrade and institutional accumulation. ETH price at $2,628.60 with $561M acquired by Abraxas Capital.
JPMorgan Chase completed the first public trading of tokenized Treasury bonds using ONDO Public Ledger.

news.summary: The prestigious Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Pacific Southwest Award finalists have been revealed by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) in ORANGE COUNTY, Calif. The award, celebrating ambitious entrepreneurs shaping the future, is now in its 40th year. The finalists will compete for the top honor, showcasing their innovative business strategies and impressive growth. Stay tuned to find out who will be crowned the Entrepreneur Of The Year for 2025 in the Pacific Southwest region.
news.headline: EY US names Amit Singh and Marcin Malyszko as finalists for Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025, celebrating ambitious entrepreneurs.

news.summary: Sony Group Corp. reported a 24% decline in quarterly consolidated sales to $17.24 billion (2.63 trillion Japanese yen) for fiscal fourth-quarter 2024, missing the analyst consensus of $20.40 billion. However, EPS of 21 cents beat the consensus estimate of 12 cents. In terms of segments and profits, Game & Network Services revenue dropped 4.2% to 1.05 trillion yen, with operating income declining 12.5% to 92.7 billion yen. Music revenue increased by 9.5% to 470.7 billion yen, and operating income rose by 17.4% to 83.6 billion yen. Pictures revenue grew by 1.9% to 414.6 billion yen, with operating income improving by 74.3% to 53.5 billion yen. Entertainment, Technology & Services revenue saw a 9.1% decline to 484.1 billion yen, with operating income loss rising to 20.4 billion yen.
news.headline: Sony reports Q4 2024 earnings: $17.24 billion sales, 24% YoY decline, EPS 21 cents, G&NS revenue down 4.2%. Spin-off considered.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Washington, it was highlighted that the landscape of vector-borne disease pathogens is being altered due to environmental and population shifts, with these diseases now reaching new regions in North America. Recent data from the Companion Animal Parasite study revealed the significant impact of these changes. This indicates a pressing need for increased surveillance and preventative measures to manage the spread of VBDs.
news.headline: Vet discusses protecting pets from rising vector-borne diseases like Lyme, heartworm as spread increases in N. America.

news.summary: A licensed international remittance company based in Coral Gables, Florida, Viamericas, has been recognized as one of the Top 100 Cross-Border Payments Companies for the year 2025 by FXC Intelligence. This acknowledgment highlights Viamericas' standing in the fintech sector and its commitment to facilitating international money transfers.
news.headline: Viamericas named among Top 100 Cross-Border Payments Companies for 2025 by FXC Intelligence.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of new COVID-19 cases in the city. Over the past week alone, 500 new cases have been confirmed, marking a sharp rise compared to the previous month. Health officials are concerned about this surge and are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to prevent further spread of the virus. The total number of active cases in the city currently stands at 1,200, with 50 individuals in critical condition being treated at local hospitals. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and are considering implementing stricter measures if the situation does not improve in the coming days. Residents are advised to stay informed and cooperate with health directives to protect themselves and the wider community.
news.headline: CEO Brad Hauser of Autonomix will speak at Virtual Investor’s Closing Bell Event.

news.summary: During a recent ceremony held at Frederick Health Hospital in Frederick, Maryland on May 14, 2025, the winners of the 2025 Nurses of the Year were revealed. This annual award recognizes two exceptional nurses within the organization: one excelling in direct patient care and the other in a different area of nursing. The prestigious title was awarded to these outstanding individuals in recognition of their dedicated service and commitment to healthcare.
news.headline: Frederick Health Hospital in Maryland announced two Nurses of the Year for 2025 in direct patient care areas, per press release.

news.summary: The information provided is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States. Please take note of this restriction.
news.headline: Volatus completes settlement of unsecured convertible debentures with shares, not for US distribution.

news.summary: Based in Commack, New York, IntelliShift is a leading connected fleet intelligence platform catering to safety and operations teams. The platform has been gaining traction recently through industry accolades, equipping fleets with essential tools, services, and assurance required to rival major competitors. By securing various awards for customer experience and innovation, IntelliShift has surpassed even some of the biggest telematics providers. This recognition underscores the platform's commitment to delivering enterprise-grade technology, expertise, and support to fleets.
news.headline: IntelliShift in Commack, N.Y., gains industry recognition and awards for customer-first innovation to empower fleets to compete, surpassing large competitors in customer experience and innovation.

news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin, SFI Trucks and Financing has been assisting truck drivers in becoming owner-operators for 30 years. The key to success for aspiring owner-operators lies in flexible leasing options and top-notch equipment. SFI Trucks and Financing helps individuals navigate the challenging landscape of entrepreneurship by providing the necessary support for leasing trucks and maintaining quality equipment. Their dedication has transformed the dreams of many driving entrepreneurs into a thriving reality.
news.headline: SFI celebrates 30 years of leasing trucks to owner-operators, providing quality equipment and support.

news.summary: A recent report on the Industrial UPS Market indicates significant growth potential. Valued at USD 6.43 billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach USD 9.14 billion by 2029, showing a promising CAGR of 6.04%. This market is highly competitive, with a combination of established global firms and emerging regional contenders vying for market dominance. Leading companies like Schneider Electric and Eaton Corporation are prominent players in this sector.
news.headline: Global industrial UPS market valued at USD 6.43bn in 2023, projected to reach USD 9.14bn by 2029, growing at 6.04% CAGR. Key players: Delta Electronics, Eaton, Huawei, Kehua Tech, Riello Elettronica, Schneider, Shenzhen Kstar, Vertiv.

news.summary: Revlon Consumer Products LLC has revealed an innovative collaboration with four-time GRAMMY-nominated artist Ice Spice, marking a significant reentry into celebrity fragrances. The global partnership aims to enhance Revlon's fragrance segment, known for successful collaborations with prominent figures. Through this strategic licensing agreement, Revlon is emphasizing its commitment to revitalizing its fragrance division. Leveraging Ice Spice's artistry, dynamism, and impact, the company intends to engage a fresh cohort of consumers.
news.headline: Revlon partners with musician Ice Spice for global fragrance deal, reviving celebrity fragrances.

news.summary: The S&P 500 has seen a 22% increase since the April lows due to reduced U.S.-China trade tensions and a pause on new tariffs. Despite this, only half of the index's stocks have risen above their 200-day moving average, indicating an incomplete market rally. Currently, only 49.9% of S&P 500 components are in a bullish trend, below the five- and 10-year averages of 60%. Over the past four years, the percentage of stocks above their 200-day moving average has fluctuated between 10% and 92%. Recent lows coincided with recession fears and monetary tightening, hitting 15% in June 2022. The highest reading, at 92%, was in May 2021 during peak post-pandemic optimism. This suggests there is room for further market participation in the ongoing rebound.
news.headline: S&P 500 up 22% since April with only 49.9% above 200-day moving average, below average. Is it time to buy laggards?

news.summary: In a recent study conducted by Feeding America, it was found that approximately 20% of children nationwide are facing food insecurity. In certain rural areas, this rate spikes to as high as 50%, highlighting a significant issue affecting young ones across the country. The study, known as Map the Meal Gap, sheds light on the concerning prevalence of hunger among children. This data emphasizes the urgent need for proactive measures to address and combat food insecurity, especially in rural communities where the problem appears to be more severe.
news.headline: Feeding America study shows 20% of US children face food insecurity; in rural areas, rates can reach 50%.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, a notable AI company, Persona AI, revealed the successful completion of its pre-seed funding round, gathering $27 million, surpassing the initial target. The substantial funds secured are set to expedite the progress and implementation of Persona's humanoid technology.
news.headline: Persona AI raises $27M in oversubscribed pre-seed funding to advance humanoid robotics development.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, NetActuate, a prominent global infrastructure and edge connectivity solutions provider, revealed a substantial expansion of its operations in Seattle, Washington. This move underscores the company's dedication to bolstering support for the swiftly expanding market in the Pacific Northwest region.
news.headline: NetActuate expands Seattle presence to meet rising demand for AI workloads and edge connectivity.

news.summary: Lead advisors from Alison Wealth Management and JL Smith Holistic Wealth Management have been honored as finalists for Advisor of the Year in their region. The recognition was announced on May 14, 2025, in Cleveland. The advisors are affiliated with Prosperity Capital Advisors (PCA), which is a well-known SEC-Registered Investment Adviser known for its focus on comprehensive planning services. This award contest signifies the exceptional expertise and dedication demonstrated by these advisors within their respective wealth management firms. This achievement showcases the commitment of PCA to recognizing top talent in the industry.
news.headline: Dave Alison and Bryan Bibbo of Prosperity Capital Advisors-Affiliated Firms received InvestmentNews 2025 Excellence Awards. Lead advisors at Alison Wealth Management and JL Smith Holistic Wealth Management were recognized as Advisor of the Year Regional Finalists.

news.summary: In Netanya, Israel on May 14, 2025, Silynxcom Ltd. (NYSE American: SYNX), a leading producer of durable tactical communication headset devices, has announced its consolidated financial report for the entire year ending on December 31, 2024.
news.headline: Silynxcom reports record $9.1M revenue in 2024 as manufacturer of tactical communication headsets.
Vivos Therapeutics to report Q1 2025 financial results and host conference call soon.

news.summary: Core Access Surgical Technologies, Inc. (CAST) based in Atlanta revealed on May 14, 2025, that their latest Clinical Trial Manuscript has been approved for publication in the Journal of the Society of Laparoscopic and Robotic Surgeons (JSLS). JSLS is a leading open-access journal in the field. This development signifies a significant achievement in the medical community.
news.headline: Core Access Surgical Technologies (CAST) trial manuscript accepted for publication in JSLS, a top journal for surgeons.

news.summary: North America's top siding brand has been chosen as the primary supplier of siding and trim for Davidson Homes. This decision was made official on May 14, 2025, in Chicago. James Hardie Building Products Inc., a subsidiary of James Hardie Industries plc (ASX: JHX) (NYSE: JHX), has solidified its position as the leading brand of siding in the region*. This partnership highlights the trust and preference Davidson Homes has in James Hardie's products.
news.headline: James Hardie's siding becomes preferred supplier for Davidson Homes; expands product deal. - CHICAGO, May 14, 2025 /PRNewswire

news.summary: Freshwater Development, a real estate development firm, has unveiled the Penthouses at 111 State in downtown Traverse City. The property boasts two full-floor residences, priced at $2.95 million and $3.25 million, aiming to be the premier luxury penthouses in the area and potentially break state price records. These condominiums promise a lavish lifestyle with direct access.
news.headline: Freshwater Development introduces Penthouses at 111 State in Traverse City with residences priced at $2.95m and $3.25m.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland today, SEALSQ has announced plans to invest $10 million in WISeSat.Space. This investment aims to speed up the deployment of a satellite constellation, enhance space-based Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) communications, and facilitate decentralized Internet of Things (IoT) transactions.
news.headline: SEALSQ invests $10 million in WISeSat.Space for satellite deployment, QKD comms, and decentralized IoT transactions.

news.summary: The Oracle Health Clinical AI Agent is making a significant impact in the healthcare industry, particularly in Canada, by reducing documentation time for practitioners by 30%. This innovative AI-powered tool, which operates through voice and screen commands, is revolutionizing health systems and improving efficiency. The success of this technology is evident in the substantial time savings it offers, highlighting the potential for enhanced productivity and streamlined processes in the medical field.
news.headline: Oracle Health introduces Clinical AI Agent in Canada to reduce documentation time by 30% for health organizations.

news.summary: In New York, impact.com, a prominent commerce partnership management platform, revealed its impressive performance in Q1 2025. The company saw success due to increased acknowledgment in the advertising sector that partner-based marketing is integral to a comprehensive marketing approach. This understanding has led brands to utilize partner-led strategies to engage genuinely with their audience, ultimately boosting revenue. Throughout the quarter, impact.com made significant investments in various product enhancements.
news.headline: impact.com experienced strong growth in Q1 2025 due to partner-led marketing, essential for brands seeking authentic connections.

news.summary: A Seattle-based company known as Tensor9 has unveiled a cutting-edge enterprise any-prem platform that empowers SaaS vendors to target enterprise clients. The company disclosed securing $4 million in a seed funding round, which was spearheaded by Wing VC. Noteworthy participants in the investment round include Devang Sachdev and NVAngels, Level Up Ventures, as well as notable industry experts formerly associated with Google, Cockroach Labs, Benchling, and Amazon. Tensor9's innovative solution provides SaaS and AI vendors with the capability to offer their services to enterprise customers.
news.headline: Tensor9 raises $4M for enterprise platform to enable SaaS vendors to sell to enterprise customers. Led by Wing VC.

news.summary: In Boston today, Superside unveiled its latest innovation - the Custom AI Image Models. This new offering revolutionizes the process of generating brand-consistent visuals on a large scale. By integrating as a Figma plug-in and customized to match a brand's assets, teams can now quickly produce visuals, boosting the marketing process and leading to quicker returns on investment. The solution addresses common challenges creative teams encounter such as high costs, with the aim of streamlining the visual content creation process.
news.headline: Superside unveils Custom AI Image Models for brand visuals, speeding up marketing with Figma plug-in, delivering consistency.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter of fiscal year, the enterprise software company exceeded expectations with its earnings and revenue figures. Additionally, its forecast for fiscal year 2026 is optimistic. As a result, Dynatrace's stock saw an increase in value. The company's strong performance has prompted positive reactions from investors and financial analysts.
news.headline: Dynatrace beats Q4 earnings and revenue estimate, guides higher for fiscal 2026. Stock rises.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Novo Nordisk signed a substantial $2.2 billion deal related to obesity, causing a surge in the shares of Septerna. This agreement propelled Septerna's stocks to remarkable heights.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk signs $2.2 billion obesity deal, boosting Septerna's shares dramatically.

news.summary: A logistics company named Avenger Logistics, operating in Chattanooga, Tennessee, was recently recognized as a Preferred Carrier by project44. This recognition is a prestigious achievement as it places Avenger Logistics among a small group of less than 2% of the project44 network, which comprises over a certain number of companies. Avenger Logistics is a subsidiary of MODE Global and specializes in third-party logistics (3PL) services.
news.headline: Avenger Logistics is now a Preferred Carrier by project44, only less than 2% of their 3PL network.

news.summary: A prominent investment solutions provider, Advisors Asset Management (AAM), in collaboration with Wilshire, a leading company, has launched a multi-strategy private markets fund. This fund offers investors a simplified pathway to private equity, private credit, and real assets. The partnership aims to provide streamlined access to these lucrative investment avenues. The initiative was announced in Monument, Colo. and New York on May 14, 2025. This strategic move opens up new opportunities for investors looking to diversify their portfolios.
news.headline: AAM partners with Wilshire to expand distribution of the Wilshire Private Assets Fund, offering access to private equity, credit, and real assets.

news.summary: Wingtra's Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) drones have recently obtained more AgEagle RedEdge-P ™ cameras to enhance their capabilities in precision agriculture and geospatial applications. The addition of these cameras will enable the drones to gather more detailed and accurate data for various purposes.
news.headline: AgEagle sold multiple cameras to Wingtra for their VTOL drones for precision agriculture and geospatial applications.

news.summary: T-Mobile's 5G network is revolutionizing the sports experience, with a significant presence at the upcoming PGA Championship from May 12-18 at Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. The telecommunications giant, known by its stock ticker NASDAQ: TMUS, revealed that its cutting-edge 5G Advanced network will enhance on-course and off-course experiences for fans. The PGA of America is set to leverage T-Mobile's technology, including network slicing, to provide unprecedented connectivity and innovative features throughout the event.
news.headline: T-Mobile's 5G to power PGA Championship at Quail Hollow Club in May; providing breakthrough experiences on and off the course. #TMUS #5G

news.summary: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, VILAS Ventures, has announced its backing for CND Life Sciences with a significant investment of $13.5 million in their Series A3 funding round. The purpose of this funding is to support the expansion of the Syn-One Test®, a diagnostic tool for Parkinson’s disease, and to further the development of diagnostics for neurodegenerative conditions.
news.headline: VILAS Ventures invests $13.5M in CND Life Sciences to advance Parkinson's diagnostic test.

news.summary: Durham, North Carolina - Bridge II Sports (BIIS) announces the 13th annual Valor Games Southeast (VGSE) in the Triangle area, supported by presenting sponsor MetLife and its employees. The theme "Undaunted, Undeterred. Undefied." embodies this year's event. Since 2013, over 1,000 Veterans with disabilities have participated in VGSE, uniting through adapted sports competition. The upcoming games span three days and feature eleven different sports.
news.headline: "Valor Games Southeast celebrates 13 years strong, engaging over 1,000 Veterans since 2013. MetLife supporting sponsor."

news.summary: In San Francisco, DiffuseDrive, a cutting-edge physical AI firm, revealed two significant achievements. The company secured $3.5 million in seed funding and achieved numerous successful implementations with Fortune 500 corporations. Their innovative generative AI technology revolutionizes data scarcity by rapidly producing photorealistic content, providing enterprises with a competitive advantage. Co-founders Balint Pasztor and Roland Pinter, experts in vision AI, made the move from Hungary to Silicon Valley to propel the company forward.
news.headline: DiffuseDrive secures $3.5M in seed funding and has successful deployments with Fortune 500 companies. AI platform revolutionizes data creation.

news.summary: American Hartford Gold, the leading precious metals retailer in the US, has unveiled the 2025 Silver coin made from the famous SS Tilawa Shipwreck Silver. The coin holds historical significance and is now accessible to collectors and investors. This exclusive piece is available for purchase, showcasing the unique treasure recovered from the shipwreck. The company's announcement comes on May 14, 2025, marking a significant event in the precious metals market. Investors and collectors are encouraged to seize the opportunity to own a piece of history with this limited-edition coin.
news.headline: American Hartford Gold releases exclusive 2025 Silver Britannia SS Tilawa Coin made from SS Tilawa Shipwreck Silver.

news.summary: The company reported a record-breaking first quarter with revenues reaching $2.2 billion, marking a significant increase of 4.2%. During this period, the company also achieved a first quarter net income of $30.3 million. Shareholders will benefit from an accrued patronage dividend of $61.6 million. It has been notably recognized as the top player in home improvement on Forbes' 2025 Best Customer Service List. Additionally, the company secured the 5th position in the list of best franchises.
news.headline: Ace Hardware's Q1 2025: $2.2B revenue (4.2% increase), $30.3M net income, $61.6M patronage dividend. #1 in customer service. #5 best franchise.

news.summary: Valmet Oyj's market announcement on May 14, 2025, at 3:45 p.m. EEST in Helsinki, reported that 509 Valmet shares were returned to the company without compensation as per the Deferred Share Plan 2023-2025.
news.headline: Valmet Oyj returned 509 shares under Deferred Share Plan on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: A data center can achieve power savings of up to 40% by implementing an end-to-end liquid-cooling solution, leading to faster deployment and reduced time-to-online. Additionally, the water consumption can be reduced by up to 40% with warm water cooling, allowing for operation at inlet temperatures of up to 45°C and decreasing the dependence on chillers.
news.headline: Supermicro introduces DLC-2 with up to 40% power savings, 40% reduced water consumption, 20% lowering of TCO in data centers.

news.summary: At a recent event held by the Association of Equipment Manufacturers on the National Mall, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) unveiled its latest innovations in manufacturing and construction. The event, which took place on May 14, 2025, featured equipment that showcased the future of these industries. Caterpillar Inc. highlighted its cutting-edge technology and iconic machinery during the exhibition. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals, who had the opportunity to witness firsthand the advancements being made by Caterpillar Inc. in the field.
news.headline: Caterpillar celebrates 100 years of construction with showcase of machinery at National Mall event in May 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Deepwatch, a prominent AI+Human cyber resilience platform, proudly announced that two of its outstanding leaders, Laura Ellen and Colleen Grounds, have been acknowledged by CRN® for their exceptional contributions. Laura Ellen, serving as the VP of Channel Sales, and Colleen Grounds, functioning as the VP of Field and Channel Marketing, have been included in the esteemed Women of the Channel list for 2025. This recognition by CRN® highlights women across vendors, distributors, solution providers, and other channel-focused entities, honoring their impactful work in the industry.
news.headline: Deepwatch's Laura Ellen and Colleen Grounds make CRN's 2025 Women of the Channel list, celebrating female leaders in the industry.
